children.text: Hello everyone. I'm Li Hua. Today, I want to talk about protecting animals.
children.keywords: Hello, Li Hua, talk about, protecting animals
children.cn: 大家好。我是李华。今天，我想谈谈保护动物。

children.text: Animals are our friends and they are very important to us.
They help to keep the balance of nature.
children.cn: 它们有助于维持自然平衡。
动物是我们的朋友，它们对我们来说非常重要。

children.text: To protect them, we should take action now.
First, we should not hurt or kill wild animals.
children.cn: 首先，我们不应该伤害或杀死野生动物。

children.text: Second, we should refuse to buy products made of animal fur.
children.cn: 第二，我们应该拒绝购买用动物皮毛制成的产品。
为了保护它们，我们现在应该采取行动。

children.text: Let's work together to protect animals. They need our help!
children.keywords: work together, protect animals, need help
children.cn: 让我们一起努力保护动物。它们需要我们的帮助！
